name: PagerDuty — DNS config deploy broke all container orchestration (Dec 2021)
problem_title: All services unreachable — DNS resolution failure after infrastructure deploy

expected.notes: DNS config change had a defect not caught in test environments. Rollback resolved DNS resolution.

mock_problem.title: All services unreachable — DNS resolution failure after infrastructure deploy

evidence.details: DNS query success rate: 100% → 0% within 2 minutes of deploy
All service health checks failing — unable to resolve internal hostnames
DNS resolution failed for db.internal, cache.internal, service-mesh.internal

entries.message: infrastructure deploy: dns-config v1.2.3 applied to container orchestration cluster
container-orchestration: all services reporting DNS resolution failure — entering error state
api-gateway: upstream connection failed — unable to resolve notification-service.internal
incident-manager: database connection failed — DNS: db.internal NXDOMAIN
ALL SERVICES DOWN — DNS resolution broken cluster-wide
customer impact: PagerDuty unavailable — alerts not being delivered

deployments.commit_message: infra: update DNS configuration for new datacenter routing — add CNAME aliases for east-us-2
infra: DNS TTL tuning for faster failover
